requests.name: List Products
requests.description: Get all products. Expected response: 200 OK with a JSON resource collection.

requests.name: Create Product
requests.description: Create a product and save the returned id to the productId environment variable for subsequent requests.

requests.name: Show Product
requests.description: Get a product by id from the productId environment variable.

requests.name: Update Product
requests.description: Replace product data by id from the productId environment variable.

requests.name: Patch Product Stock
requests.description: Partially update product stock by id from the productId environment variable.

requests.name: Delete Product
requests.description: Delete a product by id from the productId environment variable.

requests.name: Create Product - Validation Error
requests.description: Send an invalid payload. Expected response: 422 Unprocessable Entity with validation errors.
